scripts.dev: wrangler dev --local & cd src/pages && pnpm dev
scripts.pages:deploy: cd src/pages && pnpm build && cd ../.. && wrangler pages deploy src/pages/dist --project-name=fuckubitch --branch=master
scripts.db:init: drizzle-kit generate && wrangler d1 migrations apply fub --local && wrangler d1 execute fub --local --file=src/worker/db/seed.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: drizzle-kit generate && wrangler d1 migrations apply fub --remote && wrangler d1 execute fub --remote --file=src/worker/db/seed.sql
scripts.bootstrap: pnpm install && cd src/pages && pnpm install && cd ../.. && pnpm run db:init
